full_video_archive_policy: not archived; YouTube URL retained as canonical public video source

knowledge_hooks.hook: Use L'Osteria when an Indonesian F&B group is scaling outlets; multi-location growth turns Excel/fingerprint admin into management drag.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Rapid growth from two restaurants toward Bali and Jakarta made Excel, fingerprints, scheduling, and salary recaps consume two to three days.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny helped a roughly 300-staff multi-location F&B group bring scheduling and salary recap work below one day.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: ID multi-outlet F&B groups with 100+ staff, cross-city expansion, Excel scheduling, or salary recap pain.
